title: If you still want that 30% solar tax credit, the new panic date is July 4
summary:
The Trump Administration’s decision to repeal of the 30% home solar tax credit in 2025 looked like the end of the road for subsidized residential rooftop solar projects, but homeowners can still get it under certain circumstances – until America’s 250th birthday, that is.

title: With 100 JCB e-machines on-hand, this UK rental fleet makes it EZ to go EV
summary:
An equipment rental company in the UK is making it easier than ever for construction and groundskeeping crews to test out electric equipment options by adding more than 100 electric machines from JCB to its Leicestershire rental fleet.

title: Kia launches a ‘full-scale attack’ as its first EV storms into Japan’s forbidden land
summary:
Kia officially entered the forbidden land after launching its first EV in Japan. The PV5 will spearhead Kia’s “full-scale attack” on the Japanese market as it looks to take on Toyota, Honda, and Nissan on their home turf.

title: Volkswagen is about to reveal the first electric GTI
summary:
After five decades, Volkswagen confirmed the first electric GTI, the ID. Polo GTI will make its debut on Friday, May 15.

title: Bluetti 3,014Wh Elite 300 power station offers from exclusive $1,011 low, Segway F3 e-scooter + accessory credit $750, Jackery, more
summary:
Our mid-week Green Deals are jam-packed with tons of lows, some short-term promotions, exclusive savings, and more. Leading the list is Bluetti’s latest Elite 300 3,014Wh Portable Power Station and bundles at exclusive lows starting from $1,011. We also noticed Segway offering its F3 Electric Scooter with a $29.99 accessory bundle credit down at $750 for a few more days, as well as two varying exclusive deals on the Jackery HomePower 3600 Plus 3,584Wh Portable Power Station with or without a 500W solar panel starting at $1,449. From there, we have a full lineup of Beatbot pool cleaner lows during the brand’s Anniversary Sale, Greenworks’ latest ultra-compact electric pressure washer at a new low, Govee Outdoor Garden Light lows, an EGO string trimmer + leaf blower bundle, Worx sawhorses, and more waiting for you below. And don’t forget about the hangover deals at the bottom of the page, like yesterday’s full lineup of Lectric Memorial Day e-bike savings, and more.

Head below for other New Green Deals we’ve found today and, of course, Electrek’s best EV buying and leasing deals. Also, check out the new Electrek Tesla Shop for the best deals on Tesla accessories.

title: Toyota launches the bZ4X Touring, its most powerful non-GR vehicle with 367 miles range
summary:
The all-electric bZ4X Touring, sold as the bZ Woodland in the US, is Toyota’s most powerful vehicle without a GR badge. It’s also the fastest Toyota EV yet.

more…

title: Data centers are cutting power to homes, driving homeowners to solar and batteries
summary:
A Nevada utility just told 49,000 Lake Tahoe residents that it’s redirecting 75% of their electricity supply to data centers — and they have less than a year to find a new power source. It’s one of the starkest examples yet of the AI boom’s impact on everyday Americans.

The case is extreme, but the pattern is not. Across the country, data center electricity demand is reshaping the grid, driving up rates, and pushing a growing number of homeowners toward solar and battery systems — not as complementary power, but as essential infrastructure.

more…

title: Volkswagen delays the Golf EV again — Will we ever see it launch?
summary:
The all-electric Golf will not arrive in 2028 as expected. After another delay, here’s when you can expect to see the Volkswagen Golf EV now.

more…

title: Waymo expands robotaxi coverage more than 20% — larger than Rhode Island
summary:
Waymo announced a major expansion of its autonomous robotaxi service area, growing to over 1,400 square miles across 11 US cities. That’s an estimated 27% increase from its previous coverage and more territory than the entire state of Rhode Island.

The expansion starts in Miami, with Austin, Atlanta, Houston, and the San Francisco Bay Area up next for broader coverage.

more…

title: BYD eyes Stellantis EU plant takeover as EV demand spikes, confirms ‘other companies too’
summary:
BYD wants to take over underutilized plants in Europe from legacy automakers to fuel its aggressive overseas expansion. Executive vice president Stella Li confirmed that BYD is holding discussions not only with Stellantis but also with “other companies too.”

title: Jaguar’s Radical New EV Finally Has A Name, And It’s Not What We Expected
summary: For a car that’s billed as the most advanced Jaguar ever, we were expecting something a little more lavish.

title: Kia Is Ready To Build An Electric Successor To The Stinger. One Thing Is Holding It Back.
summary: A new spiritual successor to the Stinger isn't off the table, says Kia. There's just one tiny matter to address first.

title: Mazda's EV Delay Is Barely A Pivot
summary: The company just delayed its first EV project by two years. In doing so, it admitted that it had barely started on the hard part.

title: Tesla Waves Goodbye To Model S And Model X As The Last Cars Roll Off The Line
summary: The final Tesla Model S and Model X rolled off the assembly line this weekend. That marks the end of an era.

title: VW’s Hottest Electric GTI Will Have Fake Gears
summary: The ID. Polo GTI Clubsport is set to feature Hyundai N-style simulated gearshifts, after VW said it wasn’t interested.

summary: Chery and Geely have started shipping EVs and PHEVs to Canada, with thousands more scheduled to land on Canada’s shores.

title: Cadillac's EVs Are Stealing Tons Of Buyers From Other Brands
summary: Cadillac has sold more than 100,000 new EVs, and three-quarters of those buyers are new to the brand.

title: While You Stop For A 30-Minute Charge, Nio Just Swapped 1 Million EV Batteries In A Week
summary: Nio's EV battery-swapping isn't just a gimmick. The Chinese EV maker has handled over 100 million swaps to date.

title: Mercedes’ Electric C-Class Will Have Even More Range Than We Thought
summary: Mercedes says a cheaper electric C-Class with nearly 500 miles of range is coming soon.
